name: Hamaguri Shigure-ni (Sweet Cooked Clams)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the Sake, sugar, and clams into a large frying pan and stir together.
2. Bring to boil over high heat and cook for 3 minutes, uncovered. Stir in the Soy sauce and cook briskly for another minute. Remove from heat and set aside.
3. Boil the remaining liquid for 10 minutes until it becomes syrupy. Add clams and stir them gently in the sauce over high heat for 1 minute.
4. Transfer to deep bowl, and cool to room temperature. Serve cool.
NOTE: Tiny Shrimp, mussels, or bits of fresh tuna may be substituted for the clams and cockels.
